mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.created_at AS createdAt, COUNT(a.id) AS articleCount FROM tag t LEFT JOIN article_tag at2 ON t.id = at2.tag_id LEFT JOIN article a ON at2.article_id = a.id AND a.status = 1 GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.created_at ORDER BY articleCount DESC, t.created_at DESC
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.created_at AS createdAt FROM tag t INNER JOIN article_tag at2 ON t.id = at2.tag_id WHERE at2.article_id = #{articleId}
